title: MUKD-294 Sensitive Girl Kokoro Ahead Of Entrance Ceremony
overview: The young girl is full of small worries and big expectations for her new life from spring. new uniform. new environment. A new dream... But the relationship remains the same. Feeling shy and downcast, exchanging hot kisses and feeling the meat stick with the whole body. She likes having sperm on her face and cums as soon as the warm white liquid is splashed on her face.
